message:
Update --db flag help text to reflect beads file override semantics

Clarify that --db is used as a beads file override rather than
setting the BEADS_DB env var, matching actual runtime behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -475,7 +475,7 @@ pub struct Cli {
     #[arg(long, action = ArgAction::SetTrue)]
     pub no_cache: bool,
 
-    /// Resolve database path (sets BEADS_DB env var from flag value).
+    /// Resolve database path (used as beads file override).
     #[arg(long)]
     pub db: Option<PathBuf>,
